weakestMetric.label: Path shape and set-formation precision
weakestMetric.calculation: Direct motion-hint and formation slot-coordinate evidence coverage. This intentionally remains low until frame-level path extraction is promoted.
weakestMetric.currentRead: 0 motion hints and 0 formation slot hints across 6 windows.
weakestMetric.success: Frame-level boss/escort/challenge path traces and formation slot positions are available for direct reference comparison.

strongestMetric.label: Boss entry timing
strongestMetric.calculation: 35% regular-window boss presence plus 65% first boss timing fit against early/mid/late stage-band timing windows.
strongestMetric.currentRead: 5/5 regular windows expose boss presence; mean timing fit 1.
strongestMetric.success: Regular-stage boss appearances land in stage-band timing windows and vary enough over time to feel authored.

summary.topProblem: Boss/escort path-shape and formation-slot precision are not yet extracted from frame evidence, so the scorer can see event grammar before it can see true path-authenticity.
summary.strategy: Promote boss/escort/challenge path traces, formation slot coordinates, and stage-family entry labels into the ingestion corpus, then use this scorer to rank stage scripts and runtime changes.
summary.successMeasure: Raise this family above 8.0/10 with path-shape precision above 5.0/10, minimum regular-stage signature distance above 0.16, and at least two challenge windows with distinct pattern identity.

metrics.label: Boss entry timing
metrics.calculation: 35% regular-window boss presence plus 65% first boss timing fit against early/mid/late stage-band timing windows.
metrics.currentRead: 5/5 regular windows expose boss presence; mean timing fit 1.
metrics.success: Regular-stage boss appearances land in stage-band timing windows and vary enough over time to feel authored.

metrics.label: Boss escort composition
metrics.calculation: 60% boss-plus-escort windows versus target count plus 40% regular-window escort-start coverage.
metrics.currentRead: 4 regular windows contain both boss and escort signals; 4/5 regular windows have escort starts.
metrics.success: Mid/late windows include visible boss and escort relationships rather than isolated boss dives only.

metrics.label: Formation settle evidence
metrics.calculation: 75% regular-window formation-active settle proxy plus 25% source lane/column slot evidence.
metrics.currentRead: 5/5 regular windows expose formation-active counts; 0 events include source lane/column hints.
metrics.success: Evidence captures formation-active counts and, in the next scorer version, target rack slot geometry by stage.

metrics.label: Challenge-stage pattern identity
metrics.calculation: Challenge window coverage, required challenge event-family presence, enemy-family variety, and boss signal.
metrics.currentRead: 1/2 challenge windows; required-family average 1; boss signal 1.
metrics.success: Challenge stages show wave start, path, hit, result, boss/family variety, and bonus-learning opportunities.

metrics.label: Stage-to-stage formation variation
metrics.calculation: 55% closest regular-stage signature distance against minimum target plus 45% distinct-pair ratio.
metrics.currentRead: Minimum regular distance 0.106; distinct pair ratio 0.533.
metrics.success: Nearby regular stages maintain signature distance above the repetition-risk threshold.

metrics.label: Path shape and set-formation precision
metrics.calculation: Direct motion-hint and formation slot-coordinate evidence coverage. This intentionally remains low until frame-level path extraction is promoted.
metrics.currentRead: 0 motion hints and 0 formation slot hints across 6 windows.
metrics.success: Frame-level boss/escort/challenge path traces and formation slot positions are available for direct reference comparison.
